Intro_text:
On this task, you will see butterflies in different places on the screen. 
Your job is to decide if the butterflies in group 1 and group 2 show up in the the SAME places or in DIFFERENT places. 

Here is an example.
There will be two butterflies in group 1 and two butterflies in group 2. 
Pay attention to where you see them.
Then I will ask if the places were the SAME Or DIFFERENT.

Press SPACE to continue
Feedback:
Were the butterflies in group 1 in the SAME places as the ones in group 2? 

(Examiner: give feedback)

When they are the SAME press the white button.

When they are DIFFERENT press the red button.

Press SPACE to continue
Demo:
Let's try another one. Ready?

Press SPACE to continue
Practice_text:
OK, now we will practice some more.
Push the white button for SAME and the red button for DIFFERENT.

Press SPACE to continue
Task_text:
Now we are done practicing and we will do the task

Press SPACE to continue or R to repeat practice

Press SPACE to Exit!
